zeroconf_confirm.title: Salt Sentry found
zeroconf_confirm.description: {name} Salt Sentry found at {host}. Do you want to add this device?

user.title: Salt Sentry Setup
user.description: Configure your Salt Sentry device. A small distance means a lot of salt, a large distance means little salt.

error.error_full_gt_empty: Full distance must be smaller than empty distance

init.title: Salt Sentry Options
init.description: A small distance means a lot of salt, a large distance means little salt. The correction is added to the measurement (negative = subtract), in {unit}.

error.error_full_gt_empty: Full distance must be smaller than empty distance
